parameters.jsCode:
/**
 * Indexes MULTIPLE candidates into Qdrant collection: candidates_knowledge
 * Run ONCE per upload/batch — Screening Engine (07) only retrieves chunks.
 * Fictional demo profiles — see /demo
 *
 * Production: replace this node with Read Files + Extract PDF loop.
 */
const candidates = [
  {
    candidate_id: 'cand_001',
    candidate_name: 'Alex Rivera',
    source: 'demo/sample_candidate_1.md',
    cv_text: [
      '[candidate_id:cand_001] [candidate_name:Alex Rivera]',
      'Alex Rivera — Backend engineer, 8 years Java microservices on AWS. Led squad of 5.',
      'NovaPayments (2021–Present) Tech Lead/Senior Backend:',
      '- 12 Spring Boot microservices (Java 17) on AWS EKS',
      '- Kafka pipelines ~40M messages/day; p99 latency -35%',
      '- Mentored 4 engineers; hiring loops',
      'CloudRetail (2018–2021): monolith to microservices; PostgreSQL; SQS/SNS',
      'DataBridge (2016–2018): Spring Boot REST + MySQL',
      'Skills: Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, AWS, Kafka, PostgreSQL, MySQL, CI/CD, mentoring'
    ].join('\n')
  },
  {
    candidate_id: 'cand_002',
    candidate_name: 'Jordan Lee',
    source: 'demo/sample_candidate_2.md',
    cv_text: [
      '[candidate_id:cand_002] [candidate_name:Jordan Lee]',
      'Jordan Lee — Backend developer, 5 years Java/Spring Boot.',
      'ShopWave (2022–Present): Spring Boot APIs, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS ECS, JUnit',
      'MediSoft (2020–2022): Spring Boot tools + MySQL batch jobs',
      'SoftLabs (2019–2020): Java monolith bugfixes',
      'Skills: Java, Spring Boot, SQL, AWS ECS (basic), REST, JUnit',
      'Notes: no production Kafka; under 6 years; no leadership evidence'
    ].join('\n')
  },
  {
    candidate_id: 'cand_003',
    candidate_name: 'Sam Okonkwo',
    source: 'demo/sample_candidate_3.md',
    cv_text: [
      '[candidate_id:cand_003] [candidate_name:Sam Okonkwo]',
      'Sam Okonkwo — EM / former Senior Backend, 10 years Java. Leads platform team of 8.',
      'Finora EM Platform (2022–Present): Java platform libs; microservices AWS ECS+RDS; hiring scorecards',
      'Finora Senior Backend (2019–2022): ledger services; SQS + Kafka topics; mentoring',
      'LogiCore (2015–2019): Java logistics services; SQL reporting',
      'Skills: Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, AWS, Kafka (prior), SQL, CI/CD, engineering management'
    ].join('\n')
  }
];

return candidates.map((c) => ({ json: c }));
